title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 82.
content:
There was an Old Man of Kamschatka,
    Who possessed a remarkably fat cur,
    His gait and his waddle,
    Were held as a model,
    To all the fat dogs in Kamschatka.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 82." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
